reason_for_classification: This video is educational/promotional content featuring Dr. Jihad Kudsi discussing bariatric surgery practice, patient consultation, and career questions. It contains no FLS task performance, no trainer box, no laparoscopic instruments, and no timed surgical skill demonstration. Frames show interview dialogue, text overlays with practice questions, and office consultations — not FLS task execution.
content_type: Career/educational interview and consultation guide for bariatric surgeons

frame_summary.content: Title card: 'Welcome Back!' with Dr. Kudsi credentials
Surgical suite and consultation room scenes
Interview dialogue and educational overlay text with practice questions for prospective bariatric surgeons
Final consultation scenes and summary recommendations

assessment: This is not an FLS performance video. No task scoring is applicable. The video serves as educational content for surgical career guidance in bariatric surgery.
